tools.name: get_machining_services
tools.description: FEODE AI-accessible precision contract machining & testing: capabilities (large-envelope CNC, deep-hole boring up to 7m, non-magnetic drill collar repair, welding/cladding), test capacity (30k psi hydraulic, 20k psi N2, MPI/UT/PT), materials, how-it-works, payment & compliance policy. FEODE machines

tools.name: get_machining_terms
tools.description: Full intake terms & compliance requirements for FEODE's machining/testing service: required RFQ fields, KYB-lite (legal entity / country / real contact), end-use declaration, prohibited items, IP & liability terms, prepayment & accepted payment methods (bank wire / T/T).

tools.name: submit_machining_rfq
tools.description: Submit a structured machining/testing RFQ. Runs a lightweight compliance screen (prohibited-use + sanctions) and, if cleared, registers the enquiry for human follow-up from enquiry@feode.com. Not a contract or quotation; no payment is taken here. You must provide the legal entity behind the request.

tools.name: get_company_profile
tools.description: FEODE company profile: legal name, founding year (1985), HQ, Huizhou manufacturing/test base, areas served, contact.

tools.name: list_products
tools.description: List FEODE's 7 product/service lines (id, name, category).

tools.name: get_product_specs
tools.description: Detailed specs/highlights for one product line by id.

tools.name: get_certifications
tools.description: FEODE certifications: BV + CCS classification of the subsea wellhead system (incl. references), 8 API monogram licenses, PSL 4S, ISO 9001/14001/45001, national awards.

tools.name: search_capabilities
tools.description: Keyword search across FEODE products/specs. e.g. 'subsea wellhead 15000 psi', 'one trip abandonment', 'continuous circulation'.

tools.name: list_drill_pipe
tools.description: List all NOV Grant Prideco drill string items in the reference DB (drill pipe, heavy-weight drill pipe HWDP, drill collars) with id, label, product_type, connection, grade.

tools.name: get_drill_pipe_specs
tools.description: Full NOV Grant Prideco performance specs for one drill string item by id: pipe-body new/premium torsional & tensile yield, internal pressure, collapse; tool-joint OD/ID, make-up torque max/min, drift, torsional yield. Use list_drill_pipe for ids.

tools.name: search_drill_pipe
tools.description: Keyword search the NOV Grant Prideco drill string reference (e.g. 'NC50', '5 S-135', 'HT55 make-up torque', '8 drill collar', 'XT57'). Returns matching items with full specs.

tools.name: get_drill_string_guidance
tools.description: NOV Grant Prideco drill-string guidance & reference data (from the Grant Prideco 钻具技术手册, excerpted from API Spec 7 / API RP 7G): make-up torque practice (incl. the 80% drilling-torque rule), handling/grip distance, care & handling, sour service; double-shoulder connection families HT/XT/XT-M/GPDS wi

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "get_drill_string_guidance" is 1207 chars, far longer than this server's median (173). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: NOV Grant Prideco drill-string guidance & reference data (from the Grant Prideco 钻具技术手册, excerpted from API Spec 7 / API RP 7G): make-up torque practice (incl. …

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_drill_string_guidance · Private data: get_machining_terms, get_company_profile, list_drill_pipe · Public sink: submit_machining_rfq · Destructive: get_drill_string_guidance.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_drill_string_guidance · Private data: get_machining_terms, get_company_profile, list_drill_pipe · Public sink: submit_machining_rfq · Destructive: get_drill_string_guidance

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
